review_title: A good start but not competitive
description: I was initially pretty happy with Reportei but the more I’ve used it, the more I’ve been annoyed by its limitations. I mostly use a competing product now.
author: Kelly W.
pros: I like that Reportei is easy to use and that the software makes it easy to produce a dashboard or report that looks visually appealing. Integrating data sources is easy to do too.
cons: I don’t like not being able to customise element headings, integrate several Google Business Profiles into a single client’s space (for multiple physical locations) without having to reach out to support, and I don’t like that common integrations are missing.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Great Tool for Streamlining Reporting: Reportei

review_title: Effective way to create professional reports
description: As a freelancer, I find that using this tool to create reports based on data obtained from multiple sources has many advantages. First, it saves me a lot of time and effort. Instead of manually collecting data from various sources and compiling it into a report, I can use this tool to automatically collect the data and generate a report with just a few clicks. This means I can devote my time and energy to other important tasks, such as analyzing the data and making strategic decisions based on the information I discover.Another advantage of using this tool is the ability to create professional-looking reports easily. This can help me impress clients and win new business by providing visually appealing and informative reports that show the results of my work. In this way, I can demonstrate the value I bring and position myself as an expert in my field.
author: Gustavo G.
pros: One of the standout features of this product is its ability to gather data from a wide range of sources, including popular social media platforms like Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and LinkedIn, as well as Google Analytics, Google Ads, and Mailchimp. This means that users can get a comprehensive view of their online presence all in one place, without having to switch between different tools or platforms.In addition, this product makes it extremely easy to create customized reports and dashboards with just a few clicks. Users can choose from a wide variety of templates, create their own and select the channels they want to include, as well as the time period they want to analyze. The entire process can be completed in less than a minute, which is incredibly convenient for busy professionals who need to create reports on a regular basis.In addition to its ease of use and speed, this product also boasts an intuitive UI that is both clean and user-friendly. Even those who are not particularly tech-savvy should have no trouble navigating the interface and creating beautiful, informative reports and dashboards.
cons: I miss the possibility of adding third party data sources through tools like Zapier, Pabbly Connect or others, although I don't know if it is possible. Otherwise I think it is a very powerful tool that you can take advantage of.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Great for startup agencies, or freelancers that want to go from brief takers to brief makers.
description: Overall my experience with Reportei is fantastic. It filled a spot my startup agency desperately needed filled. Now we can easily show clients over a long period of time how effective certain growth strategies are. Making it easier to keep clients over the long term.
author: Joshua V.
pros: What I love most about this software is as a freelancer transitioning to becoming a startup agency I found myself needing an easy, impactful way to go from a brief taker to a brief maker. This transition required that I find a way to monitor my client's complete marketing system, so I can identify opportunities for growth, and recommend advanced services. Reportei makes this process easy, and the reports generated are beautiful, and easy to understand making our startup agency look really good from day one. The best part is Reportei allows you to send automatic reports to clients, making retainers easier to manage.
cons: I suppose what I like least about this software is every time I need to login the website is not in English. I have to choose English from the dropdown. Not a big deal, but I wish it would remember my geo-location and automatically show me the English translation. I also wish it integrated with Zapier, and Active Campaign. However, I hear those integrations are coming, and are on the roadmap.
author_profession: Email Copywriter & Soap Opera Sequence Expert
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
